info.description: Fetch account transaction history with optional filters for signer, success status, and sort order.

info.description: Fetch a receipt by ID along with the transaction that produced it.

info.description: Fetch up to 20 indexed transactions by hash in one request.
info.title: Transactions API - Transactions by Hash
